description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The ramp features a smooth, curved wooden surface for skating, flanked by sturdy concrete or stone sidewalls for structural support. Both ends of the ramp are equipped with wooden platforms and safety railings, providing secure areas for skaters to start or finish their runs. The wood is a warm, natural color, contrasting with the gray, textured stone base. The design is open and accessible, with no overhead covering or shade structures. The overall construction appears robust and suitable for heavy use by skateboarders, BMX riders, or scooter users.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with concrete sidewalls and safety railings on both ends. The structure is open, robust, and designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical face of the half-pipe, the wooden platform, and safety railings at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full curved ramp surface, both platforms, and the continuous safety railings.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the opposite platform and railings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the full curve of the ramp and both platforms with railings.
